name: best-practices
description: Intellectual humility for Claude Code — searches existing best practices on any topic, grades source quality, and falls back to first-principles reasoning when nothing reliable exists.

plugins.name: best-practices
plugins.description: When you ask about something you don't know well — technical or otherwise — silently searches for existing best practices, evaluates source quality with reverse-thinking, grades its own confidence (Found / Synthesized / Deduced), and reasons from first principles when no reliable practice exists. Use /bp for deep 3-agent investigations.
